episodes.title: Former Pentecostal Explains Speaking In Tongues
episodes.description:
As a former Pentecostal Christian, I will be explaining what "speaking in tongues" is and how it is NOT a true or real religious experience.

Pentecostalism in the Assemblies of God division is a Christian movement that emphasizes a personal relationship with Jesus Christ, the work of the Holy Spirit, and the belief that spiritual gifts such as speaking in tongues, healing, and prophecy are still active today. Assemblies of God churches focus on charismatic worship, evangelism, and living a Spirit-filled life guided by "biblical teachings". 

Start with my first video, where I tell the story of how I realized my former church was a cult and why I ultimately walked away: https://youtu.be/Y9QYn_Hhdvo

___________________________

Chapters:
0:00 Opening
0:13 Intro
0:47 Woman's Experience Speaking In Tongues
1:50 What Is Speaking In Tongues?
2:46 My Experience Speaking In Tongues
6:11 Why Speaking In Tongues Is Fake
8:05 Outro

___________________________


Welcome to ChiquitoCam — I am a 5' 2" guy who’s into sharing my real-life experiences. This channel is a mix of vlogs and my journey after leaving a strict Christian cult and rebuilding life on my own terms. Some videos are serious, some are just fun, but everything here is honest and personal. I don’t claim to have life figured out, but I like sharing the process, the crescendos and decrescendos, and the things I enjoy along the way.

episodes.title: Growing Up Gay In A Christian Cult | Ex-Pentecostal Christian
episodes.description:
This is a very special video as I was not comfortable in my sexuality back then. I was afraid to be myself when I didn't have to be. My old childhood church engraved anger, lies, and deception in my mind to the point where I was my own enemy.

Pentecostalism in the Assemblies of God division is a Christian movement that emphasizes a personal relationship with Jesus Christ, the work of the Holy Spirit, and the belief that spiritual gifts such as speaking in tongues, healing, and prophecy are still active today. Assemblies of God churches focus on charismatic worship, evangelism, and living a Spirit-filled life guided by "biblical teachings". 

Start with my first video, where I tell the story of how I realized my former church was a cult and why I ultimately walked away: https://youtu.be/Y9QYn_Hhdvo

___________________________

0:28 Intro
1:10 My Friendships
2:41 The Early Signs I Missed

4:18 Internalized Homophobia

7:55 Coming Out To My Youth Leader

episodes.title: The Origins of the Christian Cult I Was Raised In | The Creation of a Christian Cult
episodes.description:
This video tells the story of how the church I grew up in began. The founder was my grandpa's stepsister, who claimed that God gave her a revelation while she was in her laundry room. What started as a single revelation eventually grew into a church that would have a profound impact on my family, my childhood, and the way I saw the world. This is the story of how it all started.

Pentecostalism in the Assemblies of God division is a Christian movement that emphasizes a personal relationship with Jesus Christ, the work of the Holy Spirit, and the belief that spiritual gifts such as speaking in tongues, healing, and prophecy are still active today. Assemblies of God churches focus on charismatic worship, evangelism, and living a Spirit-filled life guided by "biblical teachings". 

Start with my first video, where I tell the story of how I realized my former church was a cult and why I ultimately walked away: https://youtu.be/Y9QYn_Hhdvo

___________________________

0:00 Opening
0:17 Intro
0:30 Background
0:57 The Founders of the Cult
1:40 Laundry Room Supernatural Experience
3:04 How My Mom Joined The Cult
4:23 Pastor "Brenda"
5:43 Outro

episodes.title: What Is Pentecostalism? An Ex-Pentecostal Christian Tells All
episodes.description:
As a former Pentecostal Christian, I will be explaining the beliefs and practices commonly found in Pentecostal churches, as well as the specific teachings of the church I attended. I will also share my personal reasons for leaving the movement and discuss why I came to view Pentecostalism as a cult-like religious group.

Pentecostalism in the Assemblies of God division is a Christian movement that emphasizes a personal relationship with Jesus Christ, the work of the Holy Spirit, and the belief that spiritual gifts such as speaking in tongues, healing, and prophecy are still active today. Assemblies of God churches focus on charismatic worship, evangelism, and living a Spirit-filled life guided by "biblical teachings". 

Start with my first video, where I tell the story of how I realized my former church was a cult and why I ultimately walked away: https://youtu.be/Y9QYn_Hhdvo

___________________________

0:00 Opening
0:25 Intro
0:47 What are Denominations?
1:09 What is Pentecostalism?
3:03 Salvation Experience
4:44 Why is it called Pentecostalism?
6:02 My Church's Cultish Beliefs
